headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: - (b) Subcontractor accepts exclusive liability for all taxes and contributions required of the Contractor or Subcontractor by the Federal Social Security Act and the unemployment compensation law or any similar law of any state, in respect to the employees of Subcontractor in the performance of the Subcontract Work and agrees to furnish Contractor with suitable written evidence that Subcontractor has been authorized to accept such liability. If Subcontractor  fails  to  furnish  such  evidence  prior  to  beginning  of  the  Subcontract  Work,  Contractor  may,  at  its option, pay or reserve for payment said taxes and contributions and deduct the amount so paid or reserved from payments due or thereafter to become due to Subcontractor. Subcontractor agrees to defend, indemnify and hold harmless Contractor against all claims, damages, fines, penalties, loss, costs, expenses, including but not limited to attorneys' fees, and liability, in respect to said employees under any of said laws.
